data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch codex/3d0f-stale-grooming against origin/main and found no blockers. Acceptance coverage verified: stale overview rail lists non-terminal beats older than 7 days, decisions are still_do/reshape/drop, selected targets carry explicit agent and optional model override through the API/queue/worker path, and tests cover age rules, payload shaping, prompt parsing, and route validation. Sanity gates passed after rebase: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; Playwright smoke confirmed overview rendering.
